title: A Strange Sea Near Jaya
description: On pages 1, 5, 7, 8, this part focuses on jaya’s strange sea. The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Jaya’s Strange Sea sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Miss Hina! There's still an enemy loose!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...Hmph. At what, your own income- petence?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even though the Straw- Hats got away,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gah! What's with this... iron lock!?

summary: The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
